description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:9.2.0 Docker image with a docker:dind service and a cache keyed by ${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME} that stores node_modules/ and includes untracked files. Define three stages: build, test, and docker. In the build stage add a build job that runs before_script echo \"building branch:$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME tag:$CI_BUILD_TAG\", then runs npm install and NODE_ENV=production npm run build, and stores the build/ directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that runs only on branches and tags, executing npm run coverage. In the docker stage add a docker job that runs apk add --update py-pip && pip install docker-compose, then npm run build and npm run prod, and publishes the build directory as an artifact.
